definitions.gloss_en: a stat indicating how many attack dice or attack attempts a unit makes per combat
definitions.gloss_jp: {ユニット|ゆにっと}が{1|いち}{回|かい}の{戦|せん}{闘|とう}で{行|おこな}える{攻|こう}{撃|げき}の{回|かい}{数|すう}
definitions.explanation_en: A numeric stat on a unit's profile indicating how many times it attacks per combat phase or activation.
definitions.implicit_notes: The 数 (suu, number/count) suffix creates a stat measuring the quantity of attacks. WH Japan abbreviates 攻撃数 as 攻 on datasheets, but the full compound is generic.
definitions.orthography_notes: 攻撃数: 攻撃 (attack) + 数 (number/count). Descriptive compound. WH Japan uses 攻 as a stat abbreviation on datasheets, not the full word. The full compound 攻撃数 is generic.
definitions.game_setting_notes: Miniature wargame and TRPG specific. Appears on unit stat profiles. Distinct from 攻撃力 (attack power — how effective each attack is).

usage_jp: {攻|こう}{撃|げき}{数|すう}3（{1|いち}{ターン|たーん}に3{回|かい}{攻|こう}{撃|げき}できる）
usage_en: "Attacks: 3" on a stat profile; "number of attacks".
comparative_notes: 攻撃力 (kougeki-ryoku) measures attack effectiveness or damage; 攻撃数 measures how many attacks are made. Both appear on unit profiles.

examples.japanese: このユニットの{攻|こう}{撃|げき}{数|すう}は3だ。

cross_references.note: 攻撃力 — attack power (effectiveness of each attack, distinct from count)
